tabs.context.label: Context
settings.contextPromotion.enabled.label: Auto-Promote Context
settings.contextPromotion.enabled.descri: Promote to a larger-context model on context overflow instead of compacting
settings.compaction.enabled.label: Auto-Compact
settings.compaction.enabled.description: Automatically compact context when it gets too large
settings.compaction.midTurnEnabled.label: Mid-Turn Compaction
settings.compaction.midTurnEnabled.descr: Check thresholds at safe mid-turn tool-loop boundaries before the next provider request
settings.compaction.strategy.label: Compaction Strategy
settings.compaction.strategy.description: Choose in-place context-full maintenance, auto-handoff, surgical shake (drop heavy content), snapcompact (archive history as dense images), or disable auto maintenance (off)
settings.compaction.strategy.options.con: Summarize in-place and keep the current session
settings.compaction.strategy.options.han: Generate handoff and continue in a new session
settings.compaction.strategy.options.sha: Drop heavy content (tool results + large blocks) in place; recover via artifact
settings.compaction.strategy.options.sna: Archive history onto dense bitmap images the model reads back; no LLM call
settings.compaction.strategy.options.off: Disable automatic context maintenance (same behavior as Auto-compact off)
settings.compaction.thresholdPercent.des: Percent threshold for context maintenance; set to Default to use legacy reserve-based behavior
settings.compaction.thresholdTokens.desc: Fixed token limit for context maintenance; overrides percentage if set
settings.compaction.handoffSaveToDisk.de: Save generated handoff documents to markdown files for the auto-handoff flow
settings.compaction.remoteEnabled.label: Remote Compaction
settings.compaction.remoteEnabled.descri: Use remote compaction endpoints when available instead of local summarization
settings.compaction.idleEnabled.label: Idle Compaction
settings.compaction.idleEnabled.descript: Compact context while idle when token count exceeds threshold
Token count above which idle compaction triggers
settings.compaction.idleTimeoutSeconds.d: Seconds to wait while idle before compacting
settings.compaction.supersedeReads.label: Supersede Stale Reads
settings.compaction.supersedeReads.descr: Prune older read results when the same file is read again (cache-aware, runs every turn)
settings.compaction.dropUseless.label: Elide Uneventful Results
settings.compaction.dropUseless.descript: Prune tool results flagged contextually useless (no matches, timed-out waits) once consumed (cache-aware)
settings.snapcompact.systemPrompt.label: Snapcompact System Prompt
settings.snapcompact.systemPrompt.descri: Experimental: render selected system prompt text as dense PNG image(s) and attach to the first user message (vision models only). Saves tokens; loses prompt caching for imaged text.
settings.snapcompact.systemPrompt.option: Keep the system prompt as text.
Only move loaded context-file instructions to images, when that saves tokens.
Move the full system prompt to images, when that saves tokens.
settings.snapcompact.toolResults.label: Snapcompact Tool Results
settings.snapcompact.toolResults.descrip: Experimental: render large historical tool results as dense PNG image(s) instead of text (vision models only). Saves tokens on accumulated read/search output.
settings.tools.format.label: Tool Calling Mode
settings.tools.format.description: Controls how tools are exposed to the model. Auto uses provider-native tool calls unless the selected model is marked as not supporting them, then falls back to the GLM owned dialect. Native forces provider-native tools; the other values force the named owned dialect. Applies on session start.
settings.tools.format.options.auto.label: Auto
settings.tools.format.options.auto.descr: Use native tool calls unless the model is known not to support them.
settings.tools.format.options.glm.label: GLM
settings.tools.format.options.kimi.label: Kimi
settings.tools.format.options.xml.label: XML
settings.tools.format.options.xml.descri: Use generic XML in-band tool calls.
settings.snapcompact.shape.label: Snapcompact Shape
settings.snapcompact.shape.description: Frame shape snapcompact prints text with (compaction archive and inline imaging). Auto picks a shape tuned for the current model.
Picks a shape tuned for the current model, falling back to its provider family.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.8x8r-: unscii square cell, black ink, every line printed twice with the copy on a pale highlight band.
Repeated grid with ink cycling six hues at sentence boundaries.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.8x8u-: Plain unscii square cell, single-printed lines, black ink.
Plain unscii square cell with sentence-hue ink.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.6x6u-: unscii squeezed to 6x6 — densest readable cell, fewest frames — in black ink.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.5x8-b: Original X.org 5x8 glyphs on the 2576px frame, black ink.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.5x8-s: The original snapcompact shape (pre-shape-table sessions rendered this).
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.6x12-: X.org 6x12 glyphs, black ink, function words dimmed gray.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.8on16: 8x13 glyphs on an 8x16 cell (extra leading), black ink.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.8on22: 8x13 glyphs on an 8x22 cell — extra line spacing so rows don't crowd. Default for OpenAI/Google.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.11on1: 8x13 glyphs on an 11x16 cell — extra letter spacing so characters don't merge. Default for Anthropic.
settings.snapcompact.shape.options.doc-8: Two word-wrapped newspaper columns of 8x13 glyphs on a 16px pitch, black ink.
Two-column doc layout with sentence-hue ink.
Two-column doc layout, sentence-hue ink, function words dimmed gray.
settings.branchSummary.enabled.label: Branch Summaries
settings.branchSummary.enabled.descripti: Prompt to summarize when leaving a branch
settings.ttsr.enabled.label: TTSR
settings.ttsr.enabled.description: Interrupt the agent mid-stream when output matches rule patterns (Time-Traveling Stream Rules)
settings.ttsr.contextMode.label: TTSR Context Mode
settings.ttsr.contextMode.description: What to do with partial output when TTSR triggers
settings.ttsr.interruptMode.label: TTSR Interrupt Mode
settings.ttsr.interruptMode.description: When to interrupt mid-stream vs inject warning after completion
settings.ttsr.interruptMode.options.alwa: Interrupt on prose and tool streams
settings.ttsr.interruptMode.options.tool: Interrupt only on tool-call argument matches
settings.ttsr.interruptMode.options.neve: Never interrupt; inject warning after completion
settings.ttsr.repeatMode.label: TTSR Repeat Mode
settings.ttsr.repeatMode.description: How rules can repeat: once per session or after a message gap
settings.ttsr.repeatGap.label: TTSR Repeat Gap
settings.ttsr.repeatGap.description: Messages before a rule can trigger again
settings.ttsr.repeatGap.options.5.label: 5 messages
settings.ttsr.repeatGap.options.10.label: 10 messages
settings.ttsr.repeatGap.options.15.label: 15 messages
settings.ttsr.repeatGap.options.20.label: 20 messages
settings.ttsr.repeatGap.options.30.label: 30 messages
settings.ttsr.builtinRules.label: Built-in Rules
settings.ttsr.builtinRules.description: Load the default rules shipped with the agent (override individually with ttsr.disabledRules)
settings.ttsr.disabledRules.label: Disabled Rules
settings.ttsr.disabledRules.description: Rule names to ignore entirely (applies to bundled defaults and your own rules)
